issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing tables or concurrency issues.
Installation instructions are missing for Windows, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Node.js SQLite with WAL, foreign keys, and transactional bulk insert
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for node-sqlite3 with manual BEGIN/COMMIT rather than the better-sqlite3 driver + db.transaction() pattern the skill prescribes.

scenarios.name: Add FTS5 full-text search to a posts table
scenarios.rationale: Baseline creates an FTS5 table but omits content=posts/content_rowid=id and orders by bm25() instead of rank; treatment uses the external-content pattern with rank as the skill documents.
